name: Southcoast
description_short: Southcoast Federal Credit Union is a Massachusetts-based credit union serving healthcare workers with $68.6M in assets, offering checking, savings, loans, and mortgages.
description_long:
Southcoast Federal Credit Union was established in 1976 and is headquartered in New Bedford, Massachusetts. As a member-owned financial cooperative, it has grown to serve over 4,600 loyal members with a dedicated team of 19 employees. The credit union maintains a modest but stable presence with 1 main branch location and 5 ATMs across its service area.

Southcoast offers a comprehensive suite of financial products designed for its membership base, particularly healthcare sector employees. Members can access checking accounts (Share Draft accounts with 2,300+ active), savings accounts (6,800+ members), money market accounts (100+ members), and certificates of deposit (300+ members). For credit needs, the institution provides auto loans for new and used vehicles, personal loans, mortgage options including fixed-rate and adjustable-rate mortgages, and credit cards. Digital banking services include online banking, mobile app access for iOS and Android, bill pay, remote deposit capture, e-statements, and mobile payments.

What distinguishes Southcoast is its focus on serving specific healthcare organizations with tailored financial services. The credit union provides financial education resources, student scholarships, and hosts financial workshops to support member financial literacy. Their drive-thru teller service and extended online access cater to members seeking convenience. The institution stewards $68.6 million in assets, reflecting stable financial health appropriate for its membership size.

As a small credit union, Southcoast's primary limitation is geographic accessibility—with only one branch location and five ATMs in the New Bedford area, members outside this region may face challenges. The institution is best suited for healthcare workers eligible for membership and those seeking personalized, community-focused banking rather than extensive branch networks. Current service status reports show the physical location is operational, though potential accessibility should be verified before opening an account.
services: Fixed-rate mortgages (15+ years and 15 years or less)
pros: Member-owned credit union structure typically offers lower fees and better rates than traditional banks
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards
Financial education programs and student scholarships demonstrate commitment to member financial wellness
Mobile banking app available for both iOS and Android for convenient account access
Serves 4,600+ members with $68.6M in assets, demonstrating financial stability
Healthcare sector focus provides specialized understanding of members' financial needs
Remote deposit capture and mobile payments available for digital-first banking
cons: Only 1 physical branch location in New Bedford, MA—extremely limited geographic accessibility
Just 5 ATMs total—members outside New Bedford area will struggle with cash access
Membership eligibility restricted primarily to healthcare sector employees, not open to general public
Small institution size (19 employees) may mean limited product innovation or competitive rates
No evidence of 24/7 customer service or national ATM network partnerships
best_for: Healthcare sector employees in New Bedford, Massachusetts area eligible for membership
Credit union members seeking personalized service and community-focused banking relationships
Healthcare workers wanting mortgage, auto loan, and credit products in their geographic region
diagnosis: Southcoast Federal Credit Union is best for healthcare workers in the New Bedford, Massachusetts area who are eligible for membership and prefer community-focused banking with competitive credit union rates. The primary caveat is severe geographic limitation—with only one branch and five ATMs, this institution is impractical for members outside the immediate New Bedford region or those requiring extensive branch access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
